prompt: A trendy scrapbook-style photo collage featuring a young South Asian man. He has a stylish messy undercut hairstyle and is dressed in a casual white linen shirt and jeans, wearing a golden wrist watch. He leans against a railing with a golden hour sunset over a city skyline in the background. The image is decorated with torn paper borders, polaroid-style inserts, green hand-drawn camera doodles, hearts, and handwritten font stayed text like "HM" and "Stay Posit
